# Assemblies of God Lentsweletau

> Spirit-filled Pentecostal church in Lentsweletau Village, Kweneng District, Botswana. Part of the worldwide Assemblies of God denomination.

## About

Assemblies of God Lentsweletau (AOG Lentsweletau) is a Christian church located in Lentsweletau Village, approximately 60 km north of Gaborone, Botswana. The church is part of the Assemblies of God denomination and is committed to worship, community service, and sharing the Gospel in the Kweneng District.

## Location

- Village: Lentsweletau
- District: Kweneng District
- Country: Botswana
- Approximately 60 km north of Gaborone via the A1 highway

## Services

- Sunday Worship: Every Sunday at 9:30 AM
- Midweek Service: Every Wednesday at 6:00 PM
- Youth Service: Every Friday at 5:00 PM

All services are open to everyone.

## Contact

- Phone / WhatsApp: +267 73 000 896
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61556569117681
- Website: https://lentsweletau.com

## Languages

Services and website available in English and Setswana (Tswana).

## Giving

Donations accepted via:
- Orange Money: dial *145# and send to 72 751 906
- Bank transfer: First National Bank Botswana (FNB), Molepolole branch — contact church for account details
- International: PayPal (USD)

## Denomination

Part of the Assemblies of God family (https://ag.org). The church holds the 16 Fundamental Truths of the Assemblies of God, including beliefs in salvation, baptism in the Holy Spirit, divine healing, and the Second Coming of Christ.
